name: pasteclean
description: Zero-backend, ultra-lightweight clipboard cleaner for macOS and Windows

scripts.build:assets: convert assets/icon.png -resize 16x16 assets/tray-mac.png && convert assets/icon.png -resize 32x32 assets/tray-mac@2x.png && convert assets/icon.png -resize 16x16 assets/tray-win.png && convert assets/icon.png -resize 32x32 assets/tray-win@2x.png
scripts.build: npm run build:icons && npm run tailwind:build && electron-builder
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:icons && npm run tailwind:build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:win: npm run build:icons && npm run tailwind:build && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:win-store: npm run build:icons && npm run tailwind:build && electron-builder --win appx

author: SurgeGrid
